questions: how to perform CPR on adults
CPR baby der upor ki bhabe kore
answers: CPR means Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation. Place the heel of your hand on the center of the chest, push hard and fast at 100-120 compressions per minute, and give 2 rescue breaths after every 30 compressions.
CPR korte hole chest er middle e dui hat rekhe 30 bar compress korun (2 inch depth), tarpor 2 bar mouth-to-mouth breath din. Eta repeat korte thakun until help ashe.
CPR is a life-saving technique. Steps: Call emergency, place hands center of chest, push hard and fast 30 times, tilt head back and give 2 breaths. Repeat until paramedics arrive.
CPR tokhon dite hoy jokhon keu breathing bondho kore dey ba heart stop kore. 30 compressions + 2 breaths er cycle chaliye jan. AED machine thakle seta o use korun.
